headline: Bear of the Day: The Campbell's Company (CPB)
summary: Negative earnings estimate revisions stemming from a guidance cut and a tough operating environment have led to a weak performance from CPB shares.

raw.headline: Bear of the Day: The Campbell's Company (CPB)
raw.summary: Negative earnings estimate revisions stemming from a guidance cut and a tough operating environment have led to a weak performance from CPB shares.

headline: Midday Fly By: Verizon reports ‘beat and raise,’ Shell to acquire ARC
summary: The major averages were broadly lower amid stalled peace negotiations between the U.S. and Iran as well as new escalation in the Strait of Hormuz. Investors are also balancing continued strength in corporate earnings and AI-driven optimism with rising geopolitical tension and macro uncertainty.
